l1: Is this Azure Virtual Desktop (AVD) or another VDI solution?
Is the issue affecting Full Desktop or RemoteApp?
Which client is being used?(Windows App / Remote Desktop Client /Web Client)
Which OS is used on the endpoint device?
How many users are affected?(Single user / Multiple users / All users)
Is the issue business critical?
When did the issue start?
Whether the issue is (Connectivity issue / Authentication issue / Performance issue /RemoteApp issue /Session disconnection /Black screen /Provisioning issue)
Can the issue be reproduced consistently?
Does it occur on all devices?
Does it occur on different networks?
Any recent Windows updates?
Any client updates?
Any networking, VPN, firewall, proxy, or policy changes?
l2: Collect the following -> (HostPool name / Workspace name /AppGroup name / SessionHost name / Region / Subscription ID)
Validate whether it is EntraID Joined/HybridJoined
Validate the ADConnect status
Validate the Conditional Access policies
Validate the MFA requirements
Validation at Session Host level -> (Are sessionhosts showing Healthy? / Are agents running? / Any unhealthy host status? /Is Start VM on Connect enabled?)
Check if RDP Shortpath is enabled or not?
Check wthether the Required URLs accessible or not?
Check if Firewall or proxy inspection present?
Check if DNS resolution working or not?
Confirm if FSLogix enabled? If yes then whether Profile container mounted successfully?
Check the health status of Azure Files / ANF?

l1: What exactly are users attempting to do?
What happens when the issue occurs?
Is there an error message?
Does the issue happen: ( Before sign-in?/ During sign-in? /After session launch?
How many user are affected (One user or multiple users)?
How many Session host are affected (One host or all hosts)?
If issue is with application then how many applications are affected (One application or all applications)?
Does Web Client work?
Does another device work?
Does another network work?
Can the user launch another AVD resource?
Is VPN connected?
Is the problem intermittent?
l2: Validation at Authentication Layer -> Any Entra sign-in failures? / Token acquisition failures? /Conditional Access blocks?
Validation at Broker Layer -> Is Broker communication healthy? /Any registration failures?
Validation at Session Host Layer -> Is VM running? / Is VM reachable via RDP? / Are AVD agents healthy?
Validation at Network Layer -> TCP 443 connectivity successful? / UDP Shortpath functioning? / Any latency or packet loss?
Check if this scenario supported?
Check if this is expected behaviour?
Check if there is any documented limitation

l1: Validate Azure Service Health?
Validate User Access -> If User assigned to App Group? / User licensed correctly?
Test the behaviour over Web client
Check the client version if the latest version is installed
Validate the Internet connectivity
Test the behaviour after disabling VPN
Check if DNS resolution is working expected
l2: Check the Azure Service Health -> Go to Azure Portal → Service Health.
Check for active incidents, planned maintenance, or advisories affecting AVD services in your region.

AVD Diagnostics -> Navigate to Azure Portal  -> Azure Virtual Desktop -> Diagnostics. Use Connection Diagnostics to test user connectivity. Run Registration checks to confirm session hosts are properly registered with the broker. Export logs to Log Analytics Workspace for deeper troubleshooting.
In Azure Portal → Azure Virtual Desktop → Host Pools. Verify registration status of session hosts.
Check scaling plans and autoscale readiness.
Confirm app groups are correctly assigned to workspaces.
Use Azure Monitor metrics (CPU, memory, network) to ensure performance is within thresholds.
VM running → In Azure Portal, go to Host Pool → Session Hosts. Confirm the VM status is Running.
Agent service running → Log into the VM, open Services.msc, and verify the Remote Desktop Agent Loader service is running.
Agent registration status → In Portal, check the session hosts Registration State (should be Registered).
Conditional Access → Verify policies applied to AVD users; ensure they dont unintentionally block access.
SSO validation → Test user login to confirm seamless single sign-on.
MFA validation → Check MFA enforcement in Entra ID; confirm users can complete MFA successfully.
Port 443 connectivity → Run Test-NetConnection <AVD URL> -Port 443 from the session host.
Required URLs → Ensure outbound access to AVD service endpoints (documented in Microsofts URL list)
Proxy configuration → Confirm proxy/firewall rules allow AVD traffic.
DNS resolution → Run nslookup for AVD service URLs to verify resolution.
UDP Shortpath validation → Check if UDP Shortpath is enabled; test connectivity with netstat -an | find UDP.
Profile container mount → Ensure user profile containers mount correctly during login.
Storage health → Validate Azure Files/Storage account health in Azure Portal; check latency and availability metrics.

l1: Collect the Error message / Correlation ID / Time stamp /Screenshot
MSRD Collect
Gather client-side logs from the AVD client application
l2: Event Viewer review → On the VM, open Event Viewer → Applications and Services Logs → Microsoft → Windows → RemoteDesktop. Look for errors/warnings.
Entra Sign-in Logs → In Entra ID Portal, review sign-in logs for failed attempts or conditional access blocks.
FSLogix logs → On session host, review logs at C:/ProgramData/FSLogix/Logs
TSS traces
AVD diagnostics
Kusto queries
Network capture
